overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character wearing a hooded jacket with a white spider emblem crossing a wet urban street intersection at dusk. The character walks past pedestrians waiting at the corner, crosses the zebra-striped crosswalk as vehicles pass by, and continues down the sidewalk of a city street lined with brick buildings and street trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with crosswalk approach

events.description: character steps from sidewalk onto the crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward the intersection and beginning to cross the street

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians waiting at the corner for the traffic signal to change

entered.detail: tall red brick apartment building with multiple windows lining the street
white zebra stripes painted on the wet asphalt
black pole with traffic signals and illuminated pedestrian crossing lights
green leafy trees planted along the sidewalk edge
tall modern glass building visible in the distance between the brick structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk at dusk, approaching a crosswalk. A red brick building rises on the left while a group of pedestrians waits at the corner. The character steps onto the zebra-striped crosswalk as the scene opens toward the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with vehicle traffic

events.description: white police car with blue markings drives through the intersection from left to right
passing from open intersection into the shadow cast by the building on the far side

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection crosswalk, moving from the near side to the far sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white police sedan driving through the intersection, passing behind the character
pedestrian in blue hoodie standing at the far corner waiting to cross

entered.detail: row of multi-story brick and stone buildings lining the far side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide wet intersection, with the red brick building receding into the distance on the left. A police car passes through the intersection from the left while the destination buildings on the right side grow larger. The character moves from open light into the building's shadow as they approach the far sidewalk.

events.description: character steps off the crosswalk onto the far sidewalk and continues walking straight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the far sidewalk, moving away from the intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead in the same direction down the sidewalk

entered.detail: dark storefront entrance with awning on the right side of the sidewalk
tall black street lamp illuminating the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the far sidewalk past a dark storefront entrance. The traffic light pole is passed on the left as the character moves deeper into the urban street, with brick buildings now lining the right side and street lamps illuminating the wet pavement ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a wet urban intersection at dusk, moving from an open street corner into the shadowed depths of a city block. It begins on a damp sidewalk beside a red brick building, following the character as they step onto a zebra-striped crosswalk while pedestrians wait nearby. As the character crosses the wide intersection, the brick building recedes into the distance and a police car passes by, shifting the perspective toward the larger structures on the right. The scene then transitions from the open light of the crossing into the cool shadow of the far sidewalk, passing a dark storefront entrance and a traffic light pole. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the urban street, where brick buildings now line the right side and street lamps cast a glow over the glistening pavement ahead.
